description: The moment the call connects, Agent-Assist reads across the member's accounts and pre-diagnoses the issue — member, reason, root cause, and live sentiment — so you open with an answer instead of alt-tabbing across four systems while the member waits.

One consolidated answer drawn from core banking, the payments log, the employer deposit file, and the deposit-handling SOP simultaneously — the talk-to-data moment where many systems resolve into a single root cause.

Agent-Assist hands you a plain-language script and flags the jargon to avoid, reducing handle time and member frustration. It sees where explanations historically break down and steers you around them.
The account change requires BSA/AML identity verification, and Agent-Assist surfaces the prompt at the exact required step — rather than letting it be skipped — then logs completion for compliance.

Before you act, Agent-Assist forecasts both paths: the routing fix that resolves in one call versus a retry-only path that re-declines and drives a 48-hour callback — showing the FCR and late-fee impact of each.

Agent-Assist executes the compliant resolution end to end — routing added, credit applied, payment retried — while keeping an AI-vs-human action log that records exactly what the AI did versus what you decided.
Agent-Assist drafts your after-call work — disposition, CRM note, FCR, and handle time — pre-filled and compliance-linked, so wrap-up is a review-and-save instead of a from-scratch write-up.
